message:
Skip classify_input on happy path: try doc_parse first, 2x faster parse

Restructure parse() to attempt doc_parse directly. Only fall back to
classify_input when doc_parse fails (incomplete, trailing content, or
invalid input). Eliminates redundant full-input scan for valid JSON.

Also wire doc_stringify into vj.stringify() for doc-backed proxies —
one WASM call walks the tape directly instead of traversing Proxy traps.
